scripts.kill:web: lsof -ti:3003 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo "done" || echo "no process on port 3003"
scripts.kill:api: lsof -ti:3101 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo "done" || echo "no process on port 3101"
scripts.dev: pnpm kill:web && pnpm kill:api && turbo run dev
scripts.quality:gate: pnpm check:architecture && pnpm check:list-contracts && pnpm check:sensitive-logs && pnpm check:utils-hygiene && pnpm check:sso-boundaries && pnpm type-check
scripts.loops:status: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts status
scripts.loops:doctor: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts doctor
scripts.loops:db-status: LOOPS_DB_CLI=1 pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts status
scripts.loops:db-doctor: LOOPS_DB_CLI=1 pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts doctor
scripts.loops:cost: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts cost
scripts.loops:metrics: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts metrics
scripts.loops:db-metrics: LOOPS_DB_CLI=1 pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts metrics
scripts.loops:digest: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts digest
scripts.loops:db-digest: LOOPS_DB_CLI=1 pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts digest
scripts.loops:logs: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts logs
scripts.loops:notifications: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts notifications
scripts.loops:resume: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts resume
scripts.loops:pause: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts pause
scripts.loops:resume-loop: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts resume-loop
scripts.loops:take: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts take
scripts.loops:run: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts run
scripts.loops:global-review: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts global-review
scripts.loops:reloop: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts reloop
scripts.loops:finalize: pnpm --filter @repo/api exec ts-node -r tsconfig-paths/register --project tsconfig.json ../../scripts/loops-cli.ts finalize
